goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'afternoon tea' food and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'indian' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '13:00' on 'friday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should be in the 'north' and should 'include free wifi'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'whether they have free parking'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve afternoon tea food and should be in the moderate price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves indian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 13:00 on friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the expensive price range and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should be in the north and should include free wifi
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the moderate price range
Make sure you get postcode and whether they have free parking
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
